headline: Chevron (CVX) Expands Into Greece Block 10 While Venezuela Operations Stay Running
summary: Chevron agreed to acquire a majority stake and operatorship in Greece's Southern Ionian Sea Block 10, expanding its presence in the Eastern Mediterranean. The company confirmed its operations in Venezuela remain safe and uninterrupted after major earthquakes in the country. For investors watching Chevron (NYSE:CVX), these developments highlight both new upstream exposure and an update on an existing high risk geography. The stock last closed at $172.24, with shares up 10.5% year to date and...
